case_title: ROSENBLEDT, DANIEL J. vs. FEBO, JORGE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FEBO, JORGE FEBO, MIRIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3356 CESAR CHAVEZ BLVD, LEASE FORFEITED, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.
